stories.headline: Iran ceasefire deal gives Trump a way out of war - but at a high cost

stories.headline: US Stock Futures Rally as Two-Week Ceasefire Brings Relief
stories.summary: US stock index futures rallied after President Donald Trump’s announcement of a two-week ceasefire in the Iran war triggered relief across markets.

stories.summary: In advance of upcoming talks in Islamabad, the US and Iran claim victory, as Trump lays down his terms.

stories.headline: What we know about the two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran
stories.summary: The provisional truce comes more than a month after the US and Israel launched coordinated attacks on Iran.

stories.headline: How Pakistan helped secure a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran
stories.summary: Pakistan has a historic relationship with Iran, but an agreement was far from certain, writes the BBC’s Caroline Davies

stories.headline: Ukraine war briefing: Kyiv lays out how ‘Russian satellites help Iran in war’
stories.summary: Iran bombed US bases and allies’ facilities soon after Russian satellites mapped them, according to Ukrainian assessment. What we know on day 1,505Russian satellites made detailed imagery of military facilities and critical sites across the Middle East including US bases and other targets that were attacked by Iran soon afterwards, according to a Ukrainian intelligence assessment. stories.headline: Stocks Rally, Oil Plunges on US, Iran Agreeing to Two-Week Ceasefire | Bloomberg Brief 4/8/2026
stories.summary: US equity futures and treasuries rally along with oil falling below $100 a barrel after the US and Iran agree to a two-week ceasefire deal, just hours before President Trump's deadline. Tina Fordham of Fordham Global Foresight dives deeper into the deal and Lucy Baldwin of Citi discusses the impact of the ceasefire on global growth. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Oil prices plunge and shares jump on US-Iran ceasefire plan
stories.summary: Crude prices tumbled by as much as 15% on the conditional pause but remain far higher than before the war.

stories.headline: Madagascar declares state of emergency over severe fuel shortages linked to Iran war
stories.summary: The presidency says it is taking action as it fears fuel shortages could lead to public disorder.

stories.headline: Hegseth Declares Victory in Iran Following Ceasefire Deal
stories.summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said, “Operation Epic Fury was a historic and overwhelming victory on the battlefield,” as he declared victory in the US and Israeli war against Iran on Wednesday. The statement comes a day after Washington and Tehran agreed to a two-week ceasefire. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Oil Markets Will Take Time to Fix After US-Iran Ceasefire
stories.summary: The world’s shipowners are awaiting clarity on transiting the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.headline: Tehran celebrates as Iran, US agree to two-week ceasefire
stories.summary: Iran hails the pause in hostilities as a 'victory', crediting national unity and patience for the agreement.

stories.headline: US politicians react to Trump’s Iran ceasefire with caution, relief
stories.summary: Republican hawks voice scepticism about talks with Tehran as Democrats welcome the truce and call for accountability.

stories.summary: Oil prices plunged below $100 a barrel after the US and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire that includes the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.headline: EU made 'no diplomatic effort' to end Iran war, MEP Botenga tells Euronews
stories.summary: The Left MEP told Euronews' morning show Europe Today on Wednesday that the EU should have "condemned war crimes" in Iran and welcomed the announcement of the two-week ceasefire by Washington and Tehran.

stories.headline: Trump-backed Republican Clay Fuller wins election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene
stories.summary: He will serve out the rest of Marjorie Taylor Greene's term, which ends in January 2027.

stories.headline: Top Australian soldier charged with war crimes to remain in jail on remand
stories.summary: Ben Roberts-Smith faces five charges of the war crime of murder, which has a penalty of life in prison.

stories.headline: Global Bonds Jump as Ceasefire Sows Doubts Over Steep Rate Hikes
stories.summary: Global bonds surged Wednesday on news that the US and Iran had agreed to a ceasefire, pausing a war that roiled markets for weeks by delivering the worst oil shock in years.

stories.headline: Polls in Wisconsin Reflect a More Muted Supreme Court Race
stories.summary: This year’s election has featured more undecided voters and lower overall awareness compared with recent cycles.

stories.headline: Greek and Liberian-flagged ships first to transit Hormuz since ceasefire
stories.summary: A Greek-owned bulk carrier and a Liberian-flagged vessel seem to be the first ships through the Hormuz Strait since Wednesday's ceasefire, part of a fragile two-week truce.

stories.headline: Taiwan opposition leader makes rare visit to China in 'journey for peace'
stories.summary: Taiwan’s opposition leader makes historic six-day trip to Beijing to “boost dialogue and promote peace” ahead of a heavily anticipated summit between US President Donald Trump and his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping.

stories.headline: UK house prices fall in March as uncertainty over Middle East war weighs on demand
stories.summary: Halifax reports market slowdown as mortgage rates rise

stories.headline: Emerging Market Stocks Surge Most Since 2022 After Iran Truce
stories.summary: The rebound in emerging-market assets accelerated Wednesday, with stocks heading for their best day since 2022 and currencies erasing year-to-date losses after a ceasefire between the US and Iran pushed oil prices lower.

stories.headline: Booming Hedge-Fund Options Trade Suffers Worst Month in Decade
stories.summary: A trade that went from niche to one of the biggest options strategies on Wall Street in recent years posted its worst monthly performance in more than a decade in March, underscoring how the shock of the war in Iran unraveled popular investment approaches.

stories.headline: Clay Fuller, Trump Ally, Will Take Marjorie Taylor Greene’s Seat in Georgia
stories.summary: Democrats had hoped for a strong showing, but the conservative district in Northwest Georgia elected Clay Fuller after President Trump endorsed him.

stories.headline: Voters expand liberal majority on nationally watched Wisconsin Supreme Court
stories.summary: Wisconsin is home to close elections and contentious ideological battles, and its high court could take up cases on abortion, redistricting and election disputes in coming years.

stories.headline: Republican wins runoff to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene in Congress
stories.summary: Clay Fuller, backed by President Donald Trump, defeated Democrat Shawn Harris by a much smaller margin than previous years in the deep-red district vacated by Marjorie Taylor Greene.

stories.headline: Yemen’s teachers pushed to the brink as salaries collapse
stories.summary: Yemeni teachers juggle multiple jobs and endure hunger as protests grow over meager and delayed salaries.

stories.headline: Indian central bank extends pause on key policy rate amid US-Iran crisis
Rutte meets Trump in Washington amid US threat to leave NATO
stories.summary: The Secretary General faces a delicate task: persuading Trump of the benefits of remaining in NATO, or risking deeper isolation in an increasingly unstable world. While Rutte’s reliance on flattery towards the US president has unsettled some allies, NATO observers say it's necessary.

stories.headline: Perplexity revenue jumps 50% in pivot from search to AI agents
stories.summary: San Francisco-based start-up surges from push into more complex and potentially more lucrative AI services

stories.summary: Reliance Industries has made no announcement to the stock exchange about the project in Brownsville, Texas

stories.headline: Morgan Stanley Debuts Bitcoin ETF as Price Slump Rattles Holders
stories.summary: Morgan Stanley is set to become the first Wall Street bank to launch its own Bitcoin-tracking exchange-traded fund, a milestone for the digital-asset ecosystem that underscores how deeply the original cryptocurrency has embedded itself in the financial mainstream — even as the market around it has cooled.

stories.headline: Galp Curbs Diesel Exports to Shore Up Portugal Fuel Supply
stories.summary: Galp Energia SGPS SA is limiting diesel exports to build up domestic fuel inventories, as global market volatility drives higher prices and tightens supplies across key trading regions.

stories.headline: Top UK Port Operator’s £10 Billion Sale Draws KKR, GIP, DP World
stories.summary: The sale of the controlling stake in Associated British Ports has attracted initial interest from potential bidders including KKR & Co. as well as BlackRock Inc.’s Global Infrastructure Partners, according to people familiar with the matter.

stories.headline: High Dividends Turn Telecom Stocks Into Market’s New Haven Play
stories.summary: An uncertain economy and dangerous geopolitical backdrop have investors buying into technology’s most popular haven trade: dividend-rich telecommunications stocks.

stories.headline: Democrat Wins Mayoral Race in Republican-Leaning Waukesha, Wis.
stories.summary: Alicia Halvensleben, the president of the city’s Common Council, defeated a Republican legislator, continuing a string of Trump-era mayoral wins for Democrats.

stories.summary: A wave of optimism swept through global markets, lifting stocks and bonds, and sparking the biggest drop in oil prices in years after the US and Iran reached a temporary ceasefire deal.

stories.summary: The contest for Marjorie Taylor Greene’s former seat could continue a streak of special election results that have shown a significant shift to the left.

stories.headline: Ten killed in Israeli strikes and clashes between Hamas and militia in Gaza, local sources say
stories.summary: The Israeli strikes reportedly targeted Hamas security personnel after they clashed with an Israeli-backed militia near Maghazi camp.

stories.headline: Spain's huge pork industry seeks salvation from swine fever threat

stories.headline: AI videos fuel rhetoric as Orbán bids for four more years in Hungary
